title: Initialize Python project scaffold
description: Created base project structure, package layout, and dependency metadata.

title: Define core domain models
description: Implemented typed models for company inputs, quant/qual metrics, ranked outputs, and ingestion request/response payloads.

title: Add scoring utility functions
description: Implemented reusable clamp and linear normalization helpers used by scoring engines.

title: Implement quantitative scoring model
description: Built quant scoring over valuation, growth, quality, momentum, and stability with horizon-specific weighting and driver extraction.

title: Implement qualitative scoring model
description: Built qual scoring over management, moat, governance, regulatory risk, and sentiment with horizon-specific weighting and driver extraction.

title: Implement ranking and recommendation logic
description: Composed quant+qual scores into composite score, recommendation banding, and risk notes.

title: Create sample universe for US and India
description: Added mock dataset to bootstrap end-to-end ranking flow.

title: Expose base FastAPI endpoints
description: Added /health, /v1/sample, and /v1/rank endpoints.

title: Add ingestion package and shared HTTP client
description: Created ingestion module boundaries and HTTP helper with configurable user-agent.

title: Implement Yahoo provider for market/fundamental data
description: Added symbol resolution (including India suffix handling), quote summary fetch, and chart close extraction.

title: Implement news sentiment provider
description: Added Google News RSS fetch and lexicon-based headline sentiment scoring.

title: Implement SEC filing signal provider
description: Mapped ticker->CIK and extracted lightweight filing risk indicators from SEC submissions.

title: Build feature mapping from source data to model inputs
description: Converted raw provider values to normalized QuantMetrics and heuristic QualMetrics including momentum/volatility derivation.

title: Implement ingestion orchestration pipeline
description: Connected providers into ingest_targets flow with resilient warnings and partial-failure handling.

title: Expose ingest-and-rank API endpoint
description: Added /v1/ingest-and-rank endpoint that ingests targets, ranks outputs, and returns warnings.

title: Add runnable CLI scripts
description: Added local scripts for sample run and live ingestion run.

title: Add automated tests for scoring and ingestion
description: Added deterministic unit tests for ranking bounds/order and ingestion transformations/warning paths.

title: Document usage and source assumptions
description: Added README quickstart, API examples, data-source notes, and next build steps.

title: Version control and GitHub publishing
description: Created granular commits and pushed repository to GitHub main branch.

title: Add persistent storage for ingested snapshots
description: Store normalized company snapshots and score outputs for reproducibility and historical analysis.

title: Introduce caching and request throttling
description: Cache provider responses with TTL and enforce per-source request pacing to reduce failures and limits.

title: Add retry/backoff and timeout policy per provider
description: Wrap external calls with bounded retries, jittered backoff, and clear error taxonomy.

title: Build NSE/BSE-native filings adapter
description: Integrate India market regulatory disclosures directly instead of relying only on global aggregator fields.
definition_of_done: pipeline routes India targets through adapter

title: Improve sentiment model quality
description: Replace lexicon-only scoring with model-assisted or weighted source sentiment that handles finance context better.

title: Add evidence payload to ranked output
description: Return top evidence items (headlines/filings/date/source) behind positive and negative drivers.

title: Add portfolio construction layer
description: Generate position sizing suggestions with per-stock and sector concentration limits.

title: Add backtesting harness
description: Evaluate score signals over historical periods for US and India and calibrate feature weights by horizon.

title: Introduce configuration management
description: Centralize env/config for providers, thresholds, and risk parameters with typed validation.

title: Add structured logging and request correlation
description: Emit structured logs for ingest/rank path with per-request IDs and provider timings.

title: Add data freshness and completeness checks
description: Detect stale price/fundamental/news inputs and enforce minimum completeness thresholds before ranking.

title: Harden API for production usage
description: Add auth, request limits, and schema-level guardrails for misuse/abuse.

title: Set up CI pipeline
description: Run tests and lint checks on pull requests and main branch pushes.

title: Add containerization and deployment baseline
description: Create Dockerfile and minimal deployment setup for API hosting.

title: Build scheduled ingestion jobs
description: Run periodic ingest for tracked tickers and persist snapshots for longitudinal analysis.

title: Add legal/compliance response guardrails
description: Ensure outputs are explicitly research-only and avoid actionable advisory language in generated recommendations.

title: Create CONTRIBUTING guide and development playbook
description: Document local setup, testing workflow, coding standards, and commit conventions for future contributors.

title: Define initial Jordy UI and interaction direction
description: Captured a chat-first plus structured-analysis interface direction and translated it into executable workstreams.

title: Define user personas and primary jobs-to-be-done
description: Document beginner, intermediate, and advanced investor personas and their top workflows in Jordy.

title: Design conversation intents and response contracts
description: Define supported user intents (analyze stock, compare stocks, sector ideas, risk explain) and required Jordy response sections.
definition_of_done: fallback behavior for missing data defined

title: Create information architecture for Jordy app
description: Define app-level navigation and page hierarchy: dashboard, analysis workspace, ideas table, watchlist, settings.

title: Produce low-fidelity wireframes for core flows
description: Create wireframes for first-run onboarding, analyze flow, compare flow, and watchlist flow.

title: Define UI tokens and component guidelines
description: Set typography, color, spacing, cards, table, and chart token rules to keep UI consistent.

title: Scaffold frontend web app shell
description: Create frontend app with routing, layout scaffold, and environment config for API URL.

title: Implement typed API client for Jordy backend
description: Add client methods for /v1/sample, /v1/rank, and /v1/ingest-and-rank with error handling.

title: Build chat-first Ask Jordy interface
description: Create conversational panel with prompt input, conversation history, and structured response rendering.

title: Build ranked ideas table with filters
description: Create sortable/filterable table for ranked outputs with market, sector, score, and recommendation filters.

title: Build stock detail panel with explainability
description: Show quant/qual breakdown, positives/negatives, risk notes, and evidence sources for selected stock.

title: Implement watchlist management UI
description: Enable adding/removing symbols, pinning priorities, and monitoring score changes over time.

title: Define Jordy prompt templates and tone rules
description: Create reusable response templates for beginner-friendly explanations, confidence notes, and risk disclosures.

title: Add session memory and context stitching
description: Maintain short-term conversation context so follow-up questions reuse prior symbols/horizon assumptions.

title: Add UI integration and E2E tests
description: Cover key user journeys: analyze stock, compare results, inspect risks, and save watchlist.

title: Run usability tests with beginner users
description: Test whether beginners understand recommendations, risks, and next actions from Jordy outputs.

title: Add onboarding tour and empty-state guidance
description: Guide first-time users through choosing market, horizon, and starting prompts.

title: Add F&O support (India) via underlying mapping + option-chain signals
description: Support Futures & Options workflows by mapping F&O instruments to their underlying equity/index, ingesting option-chain metrics (IV, OI change, PCR), and emitting derivative-specific risk/sentiment signals alongside equity fundamentals.
definition_of_done: accepts F&O targets like NIFTY, BANKNIFTY, RELIANCE, TCS and resolves to underlying
option-chain fetch works with throttling + caching
response includes derivative signals + clear disclaimer that this is research-only

title: Add ready-made India Equity watchlists (Nifty50, NiftyNext50, sector packs)
description: Provide prebuilt universes for quick Equity ranking runs and dashboards, with tags for sectors and market-cap tiers.
definition_of_done: CLI can ingest-and-rank by universe name

title: Standardize task tracking: TASKLIST.jsonl is the only source of truth
description: Confirmed that TASKLIST.jsonl is the canonical task ledger. Any TASKLIST.json is treated as optional/derived and should not be edited manually.

title: Add Groww provider fallback for India market snapshots
description: Implemented GrowwProvider with env-var auth and wired it into ingestion pipeline as fallback when Yahoo fetch fails.

title: Scaffold F&O/Indices module backed by Groww
description: Added basic F&O/indices service: universe endpoint, indices snapshot, and NIFTY50 LTP snapshot using GrowwFoClient.

title: Add first-class config loader for secrets (Groww) + .env support (no secrets in repo)
description: Make it easy to run Jordy locally and as a service by loading env vars from a local .env (gitignored) or 1Password injection, and validating required keys at startup for F&O endpoints.

title: Expose option-chain API endpoint + compute F&O signals (IV, OI, PCR, skew) for swing/positional
description: Add /v1/fo/option-chain (and/or /v1/fo/signals) endpoint using Groww option chain + greeks, returning normalized metrics and interpretable signals suitable for swing/positional decision support.
definition_of_done: endpoint returns option-chain for NIFTY/BANKNIFTY and 2-3 stocks

title: Horizon mapping for user workflows
description: For user workflows: Swing ~= short_term horizon; Positional ~= long_term horizon. Use these defaults in docs and UI.

title: Load Groww secrets as env vars for Jordy server via ~/.clawdbot/run/jordy.env
description: Updated jordy_server.py to merge environment variables from ~/.clawdbot/run/jordy.env into the uvicorn process environment. Added a jordy.env.example template.

title: Fix dashboard auth redirect loop for logged-out users
description: Added /unauthorized to PUBLIC_PATHS in dashboard middleware so unauthenticated users can see the unauthorized page instead of infinite redirects.

title: Bootstrap local dashboard admin access via invite token
description: Generated a local ADMIN invite token to initialize dashboard access and verify F&O snapshot pages render.

title: Groww API returns 400 Bad Request for quote/LTP with API key+secret flow
description: After loading GROWW_API_KEY/GROWW_API_SECRET from jordy.env, F&O endpoints no longer complain about missing credentials but calls fail with Groww API Error 400. Likely invalid/expired credentials or API-key+secret flow requires daily approval; consider switching to TOTP or access token flow and verify GrowwAPI SDK parameter expectations.

title: Stabilize Groww auth and add a /v1/fo/auth-check diagnostic endpoint
description: Ensure Groww integration can reliably mint an access token and fetch quotes/LTP. Add a diagnostic endpoint to report which auth method is active (without leaking secrets) and surface Groww error codes/responses for troubleshooting.
definition_of_done: indices snapshot returns real LTP for NIFTY
nifty50 snapshot returns LTP for at least 5 tickers

title: Enable Groww TOTP auth and fix NIFTY50 LTP snapshot end-to-end
description: Confirmed Groww TOTP flow works; fixed get_ltp exchange_trading_symbols format to NSE_<TICKER> and handled numeric LTP responses so dashboard NIFTY50 snapshot populates.

title: Groww option-chain endpoint returns empty strikes for all tested underlyings/expiries
description: Using valid TOTP auth, /v1/option-chain/exchange/NSE/underlying/<UND>?expiry_date=YYYY-MM-DD returns SUCCESS but payload.strikes is empty for NIFTY, BANKNIFTY, RELIANCE, SBIN across multiple expiries. This blocks strategy computation based on option-chain metrics (IV/OI/PCR/greeks). Likely account/API entitlement issue or endpoint behavior change.

title: Resolve Groww option-chain data availability (non-empty strikes) or switch provider
description: Work with Groww API settings/support to enable option-chain payload strikes, or integrate alternate source (NSE option-chain / broker) with caching + rate limits. Until resolved, strategies runner cannot be computed.
definition_of_done: option-chain returns non-empty strikes for NIFTY
at least 3 equities return non-empty strikes

title: NSE public option-chain endpoints return empty {} payload from this environment
description: Attempted fallback to https://www.nseindia.com/api/option-chain-indices?symbol=NIFTY and option-chain-equities using both requests.Session (cookie priming) and browser; responses are HTTP 200 but body is {}. This prevents NSE fallback strategy runner until data source is accessible.

title: Implement alternate option-chain data source if NSE endpoints remain empty
description: If Groww option-chain is not enabled and NSE public endpoints return empty payloads, integrate an alternate provider (broker API, paid data, or scraping via a managed browser session) with caching + throttling.

title: Dashboard Strategy Lab: show banner when option-chain strikes are empty
description: Added an explicit banner on /fo/strategies when all results are no_data so it’s clear the option-chain feed is blocked (e.g., off-hours).

title: Strategy Lab: parse Groww option-chain strikes and run with working NIFTY expiry (2026-03-30)
description: Implemented Groww option-chain summarizer (OI, PCR, ATM IV from greeks) and wired StrategyService to use it when strikes are present. Updated dashboard Strategy Lab to call strategies/run with a known-working expiry_date (2026-03-30).

title: Strategy Lab: auto-resolve a working expiry date (no manual input needed)
description: Added expiry candidate generator + StrategyService expiry probing/caching. If expiry_date is omitted, the service probes likely expiries for NIFTY until Groww returns non-empty strikes, then uses that expiry for the full run. Dashboard no longer hardcodes expiry.

title: Strategy Lab: add conservative best pick (minimal-risk/defined-risk preference) and display it
description: Extended strategies/run response to include best_min_risk (penalize high-risk and non-defined-risk strategies). Dashboard now shows two winners: profit-seeking and minimal-risk.

title: Strategy Lab: add hypothesis + proxy backtest results for chosen strategies and show on dashboard
description: Added optional explanations to /v1/fo/strategies/run (hypothesis, assumptions, failure modes) and a proxy backtest conditioned on realized-vol regime using Groww historical candles. Dashboard renders these sections for both best_overall and best_min_risk picks.

title: Connect WhatsApp gateway for notifications
description: WhatsApp gateway successfully connected and ready to send notifications.

title: Wire Jordy status + critical alerts to WhatsApp
description: Send WhatsApp alerts for Jordy backend down/restarted, failed ingestion runs, and Strategy Lab data-source issues. Should be concise, actionable, and include link to dashboard/logs.
definition_of_done: WhatsApp message sent when jordy_server restart happens
messages include log path and dashboard URL

title: Daily WhatsApp digest: watchlist movers + top strategy picks
description: Send a once-daily digest summarizing watchlist score changes (equity) and top Strategy Lab picks (F&O), including confidence, key drivers, and data-quality flags.
definition_of_done: cron job runs daily at configured time
no sensitive secrets leaked in message

title: Add WhatsApp command interface (basic): 'status', 'run strategies', 'rank watchlist'
description: Allow Subhash to trigger a few safe Jordy actions via WhatsApp messages routed to Clawdbot (no trading execution).
definition_of_done: 'rank watchlist' triggers ingest-and-rank on configured list
